data.title: Breaking into Business Brokerage: How Women are Redefining a Traditionally Male-Dominated Industry
data.description: The "WOW" Network by We Sell Restaurants shines a spotlight on a significant achievement in gender equality within the business brokerage sector, with almost twice the number of women compared to the industry average. Based in Palm Coast, Florida, this impressive development was highlighted on March 31, 2026. The increasing trend of women venturing into entrepreneurship and owning businesses is being positively reflected in this particular industry.

data.title: St. Luke's University Health Network Honored with Richard L. Doyle Award for Innovative Care Planning
data.description: A hospital system in Pennsylvania has been commended for effectively reducing unnecessary ER visits and readmissions. The achievement was announced by MCG Health on March 31, 2026, a part of Hearst Health network, which is known for providing reliable clinical guidance. The hospital system in Bethlehem was recognized for its success in improving patient care and lowering healthcare costs by reducing avoidable ER visits and readmissions. This recognition highlights the significant impact of their efforts on enhancing healthcare quality.

data.title: Zoom Room Names Former Petco CEO Ron Coughlin Chairman of the Board as Brand Accelerates National Expansion
data.description: Experienced Petco executive Soumik Chatterjee has recently joined Zoom Room as the company's Chief Financial Officer, bringing with him a wealth of knowledge and expertise in pet brands. This move comes as Zoom Room aims to strengthen its leadership team, with another industry veteran, Ron Coughlin, also stepping into a key role. The company's decision to recruit these seasoned professionals underscores its commitment to growth and success in the competitive pet industry. This development signifies a significant shift within Zoom Room, as they strategically position themselves for future expansion and advancement.

data.title: Digitally Enabled Supply Chains Make Faster Recovery a Medtech Differentiator, Deloitte Survey Finds
data.description: A recent survey conducted on 100 executives uncovered shortcomings in recovery pace, governance, and preparedness for cyber and regulatory challenges. The study, released by the Deloitte Center for Health Solutions in New York on March 31, 2026, highlighted that companies with digitally supported recovery processes tend to achieve better financial results.

data.title: Moneta Strengthens Advisor Growth Strategy with Strategic Marketing Hires
data.description: Moneta Group Investment Advisors, LLC, a prominent Registered Investment Advisors (RIAs), recently disclosed the appointment of key individuals as part of its ongoing commitment to advisor development and sustainable organic growth. This move underlines the firm's dedication to expanding its reach within the industry. This announcement comes from St. Louis on March 31, 2026.

data.title: Veteran Tech Executive Scott Van Vliet Joins Xoriant's Board
data.description: Scott Van Vliet, with experience in scaling Microsoft Teams to hundreds of millions of users and developing the platform behind Azure OpenAI, has joined Xoriant's Board to enhance the company's Applied Intelligence strategy. This update comes as Xoriant aims to accelerate its growth in the AI industry. The company is based in SUNNYVALE, California, and MUMBAI, India.

data.title: Gan & Lee Pharmaceuticals' Once-Weekly Basal Insulin GZR4 Injection Meets Primary Endpoints in Two Pivotal Phase 3 Clinical Trials: SUPER-1 and SUPER-2
data.description: In a press release dated March 31, 2026, Gan & Lee Pharmaceuticals disclosed that their investigative once-weekly insulin GZR4 Injection has shown promising results in two pivotal phase 3 clinical trials named SUPER-1 and SUPER-2. The trials, designed to evaluate the drug's effectiveness, were successful in meeting their predetermined endpoints. Gan & Lee Pharmaceuticals, listed under the SSE with ticker symbol 603087, made the announcement from their headquarters located in Beijing, China, and Bridgewater, New Jersey.

data.title: Tracker Becomes One of the First ATS Platforms to Launch Integration with LinkedIn Hiring Assistant
data.description: In Knoxville, Tennessee, a recent development allows recruiters to streamline applicant evaluation using LinkedIn Hiring Assistant. This integration merges data from LinkedIn and Tracker, enabling recruiters to identify top candidates more efficiently. This innovation is set to enhance the recruitment process and improve hiring outcomes by leveraging the combined resources of the two platforms.

data.title: OpenFX secures $94M to enhance stablecoin-powered FX network for accelerating cross-border transactions amidst rising demand.
data.description: OpenFX secured $94 million in its Series A funding round to scale up its stablecoin-powered FX network in response to the increasing need for quicker cross-border transactions.

data.title: EEZ initiative aims to unite fragmented Ethereum rollups into one system; faces challenges after similar attempts on Cosmos.
data.description: The Ethereum Economic Zone aims to unify fragmented rollups into a cohesive system, overcoming challenges faced by a comparable model in Cosmos.

data.title: CertiK warns about OpenClaw AI agents draining crypto wallets with malicious skills; cautions non-techy users against using it.
data.description: CertiK cautioned non-experts, recommending against the installation and utilization of OpenClaw.

data.title: Base has partnered with Ethereum and Tron to enhance its chain for AI agents, along with developers and traders.
data.description: Base, the Ethereum layer-2 solution by Coinbase, is set to undergo an upgrade to enable AI agents to utilize it as developers or traders do.
